name: benin-top-builders
description: Bénin Top Builders — écosystème numérique du BTP au Bénin

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c orange,blue "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
